pkgmetadata.longdescription: a hrefhttpsexplosion.aiimg srchttpsexplosion.aiassetsimglogo.svg width125 height125 alignright a spacy-pkuseg Chinese word segmentation toolkit for spaCyThis package is a fork of[pkuseg-python](httpsgithub.comlancopkupkuseg-python) that simplifiesinstallation and serialization for use with [spaCy](httpsspacy.io). Theunderlying segmentation tools remain unmodified.---------- pkuseg [(English Version)](readmereadme_english.md)pkuseg [[Luo et. al, 2019]()] []() []() []() []() []() []() []() pkuseg1. [example.txt](httpsgithub.comlancopkupkuseg-pythonblobmasterexample.txt)2. pkuseg3. 4. - python3- pip install1. PyPI()pip3 install pkusegimport pkuseg pip3 install -U pkuseg2. PyPI pip3 install -i httpspypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cnsimple pkuseg pip3 install -i httpspypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cnsimple -U pkuseg 3. pipGitHubpython setup.py build_ext -i GitHub[release](httpsgithub.comlancopkupkuseg-pythonreleases)model_name12linux(ubuntu)macwindows 64 python33 jiebaTHULACpkuseg[](readmeenvironment.md) MSRA Precision Recall F-score ----- -------- ----- -------- jieba 87.01 89.88 88.42 THULAC 95.60 95.91 95.71 pkuseg 96.94 96.81 96.88 WEIBO Precision Recall F-score ----- -------- ----- -------- jieba 87.79 87.54 87.66 THULAC 93.40 92.40 92.87 pkuseg 93.78 94.65 94.21 Default MSRA CTB8 PKU WEIBO All Average ------- --- --- --- --- --------- jieba 81.45 79.58 81.83 83.56 81.61 THULAC 85.55 87.84 92.29 86.65 88.08 pkuseg 87.29 91.77 92.68 93.43 91.29 All AverageF-score[](readmecomparison.md) python1python3import pkusegseg pkuseg.pkuseg() text seg.cut() print(text)2python3import pkusegseg pkuseg.pkuseg(model_namemedicine) text seg.cut() print(text)3 [tags.txt](httpsgithub.comlancopkupkuseg-pythonblobmastertags.txt)python3import pkusegseg pkuseg.pkuseg(postagTrue) text seg.cut() print(text)4python3import pkuseg input.txtoutput.txt 20pkuseg.test(input.txt, output.txt, nthread20) [](readmeinterface.md) pkuseg.pkuseg(model_name default, user_dict default, postag False)model_name default(pip)news, web, medicine, tourism, model_path, user_dictdefault, None, dict_path, tabpostag False, True, pkuseg.test(readFile, outputFile, model_name default, user_dict default, postag False, nthread 10)readFileoutputFilemodel_namepkuseg.pkuseguser_dictpkuseg.pkusegpostagpkuseg.pkusegnthreadpkuseg.train(trainFile, testFile, savedir, train_iter 20, init_model None)trainFiletestFilesavedirtrain_iterinit_modelNoneinit_model.models if __name__ __main__[](readmemultiprocess.md) pipmodel_namegithubmodel_name[release](httpsgithub.comlancopkupkuseg-pythonreleases)- news MSRA- web - medicine - tourism - mixed pip [](readmehistory.md) 1. MIT2. jingjingxupku.edu.cn Ruixuan Luo, Jingjing Xu, Yi Zhang, Xuancheng Ren, Xu Sun. [PKUSEG A Toolkit for Multi-Domain Chinese Word Segmentation](httpsarxiv.orgabs1906.11455). Arxiv. 2019.article{pkuseg, author {Luo, Ruixuan and Xu, Jingjing and Zhang, Yi and Ren, Xuancheng and Sun, Xu}, journal {CoRR}, title {PKUSEG A Toolkit for Multi-Domain Chinese Word Segmentation.}, url {httpsarxiv.orgabs1906.11455}, volume {abs1906.11455}, year 2019} Xu Sun, Houfeng Wang, Wenjie Li. Fast Online Training with Frequency-Adaptive Learning Rates for Chinese Word Segmentation and New Word Detection. ACL. 2012. Jingjing Xu and Xu Sun. Dependency-based gated recursive neural network for chinese word segmentation. ACL. 2016. Jingjing Xu and Xu Sun. Transfer learning for low-resource chinese word segmentation with a novel neural network. NLPCC. 2017. 1. [pkuseg](httpsgithub.comlancopkupkuseg-pythonwikiFAQ1-pkuseg)2.
